name: I am going for a beer
short_description: You're just an ordinary guy, coming home after a long day. Beer in hand, TV on... but suddenly it runs out. Time to leave your cozy apartment, go down the stairs, cross the street, and get to the supermarket to find the best beer in the world. But isn’t this a strange dream? When will it end?
detailed_description:
You're just an ordinary guy, coming home after a long day. Beer in hand, TV in front of you... and suddenly, the beer runs out. Time to leave your cozy apartment, go down the stairs, cross the street, get to the supermarket, and find the best beer in the world. But isn’t this a strange dream? When will it end?

You’ve fallen asleep, and the only way to wake up is to reach your goal. This is a 3D platformer puzzle game where each level presents a path filled with unique challenges to solve. Navigate your apartment, conquer the stairwell, cross the street using traffic lights, and explore the supermarket to uncover hidden anomalies. Each puzzle brings you one step closer to your ultimate prize: the best beer in the world.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
